summary: Full Theron council synthesis across all 30 domain specialists
description: Routes a complex multi-domain query to the full Theron council — up to 30 domain specialists including Cyber, Code, Legal, Medical, Finance, Research, and more. Each specialist independently produces domain-relevant analysis; the council coordinator synthesizes into a unified structured response. Use for high-stakes decisions requiring multi-perspective depth. Billed per 1K input tokens (council intake) and per 1K output tokens (synthesized response). Token count is over the full council interaction, not just the final output.
